response.overview: Sponsored by the Minister Plenipotentiary of the Argentine Republic. Contains: in the city; after mass; Plaza de Armas; they stroll; at the tennis courts; by moonlight; the National College of Sciences; one of the important railway works being carried out by the government; the locomotive; colonial customs; colonial-style stone buildings in the Plaza de Armas; tiled dome of the Church of the Society of Jesus; the university; the cathedral; procession of the Lord of the Earthquakes; the Church of La Merced; Corpus Christi on silver litters; dozens of Indians gather at the foot of each litter to lend aid to their brothers; Our Lady of Bethlehem; Inca Cuzco; Inca streets; the Intihuatana; the palace of Manco; Quencco; Ollantaytambo; Sacsayhuaman; historical reconstruction of the Cahuide waterfall.
response.title: El Cuzco y reconstrucciones históricas
